description_long: This is a vintage record player with a square, boxy wooden base that shows signs of age and wear, including faded paint and scuff marks. The top surface is metallic and slightly rusted, supporting a large, round black turntable platter with a visible record featuring a central label. A prominent, curved brass tonearm extends from the back right corner, arching over the platter and ending above the record, with a metallic lever or handle visible on the left side. The front panel features a small, faded label and a winding crank protruding from the right side, suggesting manual operation. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, with exposed mechanical parts and a patina that hints at decades of use. The object exudes a sense of historical charm, making it a striking artifact in any urban or retro-themed environment.
description: A weathered, vintage record player with a wooden base, metallic top, brass tonearm, and a visible black record on the platter. The device features a winding crank and aged details, evoking a sense of historical charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square wooden base, metallic top, record on the platter, and the brass tonearm extending upward. The front label and winding crank on the right are visible.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the full length of the brass tonearm, the winding crank, and the side panel's aged texture.
description_view_2: Rear view with the tonearm facing directly forward, showing the back panel and the metallic lever or handle on the left side.
description_view_3: Left-side view displaying the tonearm's curve, the lever or handle, and the plain wooden side panel.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present and prominently visible, circular in shape, and occupies a large portion of the top surface. It appears to be made of metal or hard plastic, covered by a black vinyl record with a central label. The platter has a matte finish and no visible grooves or patterns beyond the record itself.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, made of brass with a curved, tubular shape. It is medium in length, extending from the back right corner and arching over the platter, positioned above the record. The finish is aged and slightly tarnished, with visible joints at the base.
attribute_control_knobs: One winding crank is visible on the right side, metallic and cylindrical in shape. There is also a small round knob or button on the top left corner, black in color, but no clear labels or markings are visible.
